second_run_note: A --deep re-run (save-suffix v3deep) was attempted to widen coverage. It net-regressed: 'vs' in the topic triggered comparison-split (Reddit -> r/Netherlands/r/UrbanHell), X returned HTTP 403, TikTok/IG/Threads stayed empty, Polymarket dropped to 2. Only additive value was 2 YouTube videos (archived) and a few extra web pages. The original v3 run remains the canonical corpus.
